description: Schema for the MultiIndex market data DataFrame used by all src/ modules

columns.Open: float64 — split and dividend adjusted open price
columns.High: float64 — split and dividend adjusted daily high
columns.Low: float64 — split and dividend adjusted daily low
columns.Close: float64 — split and dividend adjusted close price

notes: Data is adjusted for splits and dividends (auto_adjust=True in yfinance)
NaN values indicate the ticker was delisted or data is unavailable for that date
Use .shift(1) before any signal computation to ensure point-in-time integrity
